criteria.description: window.runPlayabilityCheck() exists and is callable
testSteps: Call window.runPlayabilityCheck() and verify it returns a value
criteria.threshold: Function exists and returns a result (not undefined)

criteria.description: runPlayabilityCheck returns a JSON report with per-stage results for all 13 stages
testSteps: Call window.runPlayabilityCheck() and check result has 13 stage entries
criteria.threshold: Result is an object/array with entries for stages 1-1 through 5-1

criteria.description: Each stage result contains stageId, name, pathResult (PASS/FAIL), and details
testSteps: Inspect individual stage results in the report
criteria.threshold: Each entry has stageId, name, pathResult fields

criteria.description: BFS pathfinder uses player physics: jump height of 4 tiles (128px)
testSteps: Verify pathfinder jump height constant is 4 tiles or 128px
criteria.threshold: Jump height parameter equals 4 tiles

criteria.description: BFS pathfinder uses player physics: wall-jump reach of 3 tiles (96px) horizontal
testSteps: Verify wall-jump horizontal reach constant is 3 tiles or 96px
criteria.threshold: Wall-jump reach parameter equals 3 tiles

criteria.description: Pathfinder finds path from spawn to boss trigger zone for each stage
testSteps: Run validation and check that paths connect spawn to boss area
criteria.threshold: Path validation checks spawn-to-boss-trigger connectivity

criteria.description: Pathfinder treats one-way platforms as valid traversal nodes (standable from above)
testSteps: Verify TILE_ONE_WAY is handled in the pathfinder as a standable surface
criteria.threshold: One-way platforms are walkable/standable in BFS

criteria.description: Pathfinder treats ladders as valid traversal nodes (climbable)
testSteps: Verify TILE_LADDER allows vertical traversal in BFS
criteria.threshold: Ladders enable upward movement in pathfinder

criteria.description: Pathfinder treats bounce pads as valid traversal (higher jump)
testSteps: Verify TILE_BOUNCE grants higher vertical reach in BFS
criteria.threshold: Bounce pads grant extra jump height in pathfinder

criteria.description: Pathfinder treats crumbling platforms as valid traversal nodes
testSteps: Verify TILE_CRUMBLE is treated as standable in BFS
criteria.threshold: Crumbling platforms are walkable in pathfinder

criteria.description: Pressing 'D' on title screen opens debug/validator overlay
testSteps: On title screen, press D key
Verify debug overlay appears
criteria.threshold: Debug overlay is displayed when D is pressed on title screen

criteria.description: Debug overlay shows validation results for all 13 stages
testSteps: Open debug overlay
Verify all 13 stages are listed with results
criteria.threshold: All 13 stages shown with PASS/FAIL status

criteria.description: Debug overlay is scrollable to view all results
testSteps: Open debug overlay with results
Verify scrolling works (arrow keys)
criteria.threshold: Results can be scrolled through with arrow keys

criteria.description: Debug overlay uses design spec colors (Deep Charcoal bg, Soft Cream text, Muted Gold accents)
testSteps: Verify overlay uses #1A1A2E, #E8DCC8, #C4A35A
criteria.threshold: Design spec colors used for overlay

criteria.description: PASS results shown in Moss Green, FAIL results shown in Ember Red
testSteps: Verify PASS uses #5A9E6F and FAIL uses #D94F4F
criteria.threshold: Correct color coding for results

criteria.description: Validator file (src/validator.js) is loaded via script tag in index.html
testSteps: Check index.html has script tag for validator.js
criteria.threshold: Script tag present and loads before game.js

criteria.description: Failed path results include coordinates of first unreachable section
testSteps: Check FAIL results for coordinate information
criteria.threshold: FAIL entries include x/y or col/row of unreachable area

criteria.description: Pressing Escape or D from debug overlay returns to title screen
testSteps: Open debug overlay
Press Escape
Verify return to title
criteria.threshold: Overlay closes and title screen is restored

criteria.description: Title screen still works normally (menu navigation, Enter to select)
testSteps: Navigate title menu with arrows
Press Enter to start game
criteria.threshold: Title screen functions as before

criteria.description: Game still runs at 60fps after adding validator code
testSteps: Play a stage and check fps via window.__gameDebug.fps
criteria.threshold: FPS >= 55 during normal gameplay
